expectations.text: Writes episodic memory file to harness/memory/episodic/
Episodic memory follows spec format: Episode title, Context, Lesson, Impact
expectations.evidence: Has all required sections: Episode title, Context (full scenario), Lesson (symlink behavior), Impact (future behavior changes)

expectations.text: The lesson captures the non-obvious /var symlink behavior
expectations.evidence: Lesson: macOS has symlinks /var -> /private/var, /tmp -> /private/tmp, /etc -> /private/etc. Always use Path.resolve() for comparison.

expectations.text: Impact section describes how this changes future behavior (use Path.resolve)
expectations.evidence: Impact: When writing/reviewing tests with file paths, use Path.resolve(); check platform-specific behavior; candidate for lint-quality rule

expectations.text: Updates INDEX.md with new episodic entry in the Episodic section
expectations.evidence: INDEX.md updated with new entry: [macos-symlink-path-comparison] in Episodic section

expectations.text: Suggests adding this to docs/DEVELOPMENT.md as a known gotcha
expectations.evidence: docs/DEVELOPMENT.md update suggested with Cross-Platform Testing Notes section + lint-quality candidate for Critic-Refiner loop
